description: Black handbag with synthetic leather trims in white with animal print, belt with a twist clasp on the front, two short handles for carrying ease, one metallic brand badge fixed on the front and one hanging from the handles, a synthetic leather trim design hanging from the handles, synthetic leather trims interwoven through the exterior on the front for style, two zippered compartments with an organiser sleeve in one and a zipped pocket in the other, two metallic loops on each side and one long adjustable and detachable strap to sling over the shoulder, one external zipped pocket at the back
